item.title: Nudge 1.2.0
item.description:
Nudge 1.2.0

  • Standalone app with a real dock icon (no longer runs as a background agent)
  • Expanded view is a proper titled window — use the yellow traffic light to collapse back to the HUD, red to hide the window entirely
  • Standard macOS menu: Cmd+Q quits, Cmd+H hides, Cmd+M minimizes
  • Removed the custom quit button, the "Quit Nudge" card, and the daily-intention prompt
  • Removed the launchd auto-restart agent — Nudge now behaves like a normal Mac app
  • Sparkle check interval tightened to 10 minutes

item.title: Nudge 1.1
item.description:
Nudge 1.1

  • Removed the unnecessary yellow minimize button from the minimized view (only the red quit button remains)
  • Now Developer ID signed and notarized by Apple

item.title: Nudge 1.0
item.description:
Nudge 1.0

  • Schedule view with time blocks, countdown, and progress
  • Todo mode with priorities, descriptions, and quick-add
  • Personalized onboarding with name and widget mode selection
  • 20-20-20 eye break reminders
  • Water reminders
  • Configurable snap-to-corner
  • Auto-updates via Sparkle
